name: Angel Hair Pasta with Lemon & Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to a boil over high heat and maintain at a boil.
2. In a sauté pan, add olive oil and garlic. Cook over medium heat until the garlic begins to brown. Remove from heat.
3. Add white wine to the pan. Return it to heat. Cook for another 1 to 2 minutes, until the wine has reduced by half.
4. Stir in lemon juice and chopped tomato. Remove from heat.
5. In boiling water, cook pasta to desired doneness (30 seconds to 1 minute). Drain and transfer to a warm serving bowl.
6. Add basil, parmesan cheese, black pepper, and the tomato mixture. Toss gently and serve immediately.
